verdict_reason: Both disagreements (padam anāmayam; janma-bandha) are substantively explained. The padam anāmayam entry correctly identifies the four-way theological divergence (Shankara: theistic-Advaita Liberation; Ramanuja: Vishishtadvaita devotional liberation; Prabhupada: Gaudiya 'going back to Godhead'; Mukundananda: tradition-neutral lexical floor) and ties it to the engineering-layer constraint ('stay close to operational truth'). The janma-bandha entry correctly identifies that all four traditions read it as metaphysical (saṁsāric chain) and explicitly forecloses the misreading 'cycle of bad rollouts'. Both entries name the lexical/doctrinal substance and the engineering-layer constraint. Pass.
